response.justification: Sarah has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and her German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for this role.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public libraries
Extensive full-stack experience across languages, platforms, and cloud infrastructures
Proven track record in mentoring, workshops, and technical education
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required)
No clear evidence of UML expertise or formal architecture design leadership
Lacks documented experience managing client projects or advising on compliance/security at executive level
